en: "Woe to those who are at ease in Zion, and to those who feel secure on the mountain of Samaria, the notable men of the first of the nations, to whom the house of Israel comes!
zh: 那些在錫安平靜安逸的， 安穩在撒瑪利亞山上的，有禍了！ 你們是這列國中為首之大國的領袖， 是以色列家所歸向的。

en: Pass over to Calneh, and see, and from there go to Hamath the great; then go down to Gath of the Philistines. Are you better than these kingdoms? Or is their territory greater than your territory,
zh: 你們要過去甲尼看看， 從那裡往哈馬大城去， 然後下到非利士的迦特； 看你們是否比這些國家勝一籌？ 他們的領土是否比你們的領土還大？

en: O you who put far away the day of disaster and bring near the seat of violence?
zh: 你們認為災禍的日子離開很遠， 你們的行為卻招致殘暴的審判。

en: "Woe to those who lie on beds of ivory and stretch themselves out on their couches, and eat lambs from the flock and calves from the midst of the stall,
zh: 你們臥在象牙床上， 躺在榻上； 你們吃羊群中的羊羔， 和牛棚裡的牛犢。

en: who sing idle songs to the sound of the harp and like David invent for themselves instruments of music,
zh: 你們閒逸地彈琴奏樂， 又為自己製造樂器，像大衛一樣。

en: who drink wine in bowls and anoint themselves with the finest oils, but are not grieved over the ruin of Joseph!
zh: 你們用大碗喝酒， 用最貴重的膏油抹身； 但你們並沒有為約瑟的敗落而痛心。

en: Therefore they shall now be the first of those who go into exile, and the revelry of those who stretch themselves out shall pass away."
zh: 因此，你們將是最先被擄去的人， 宴樂享受的日子必要消逝。

en: The Lord GOD has sworn by himself, declares the LORD, the God of hosts: "I abhor the pride of Jacob and hate his strongholds, and I will deliver up the city and all that is in it."
zh: 主耶和華指著自己起誓說： “我痛恨雅各所誇耀的， 憎惡他的堡壘； 我要把城市和城中的一切， 都交給敵人。”這是耶和華萬軍的 神的宣告。

en: And if ten men remain in one house, they shall die.
zh: 如果在一間房子裡剩下十個人，他們都必死亡。

en: And when one's relative, the one who anoints him for burial, shall take him up to bring the bones out of the house, and shall say to him who is in the innermost parts of the house, "Is there still anyone with you?" he shall say, "No"; and he shall say, "Silence! We must not mention the name of the LORD."
zh: 死者的親屬和殮葬的人把屍體從房子抬走，並問那躲在屋內深處的人：“還有人嗎？”那人回答：“沒有，不要再說話，不可再提耶和華的名。”

en: For behold, the LORD commands, and the great house shall be struck down into fragments, and the little house into bits.
zh: 看哪！耶和華下令，大樓就粉碎， 小屋也要破裂。

en: Do horses run on rocks? Does one plow there with oxen? But you have turned justice into poison and the fruit of righteousness into wormwood-
zh: 馬會在懸崖奔馳嗎？ 人會用牛耙海嗎？ 但你使公正變為毒草， 使公義的果子轉為苦堇。

en: you who rejoice in Lo-debar, who say, "Have we not by our own strength captured Karnaim for ourselves?"
zh: 你們以奪取羅底巴為誇耀， 說：“我們奪取加寧不是靠自己的力量嗎？”

en: "For behold, I will raise up against you a nation, O house of Israel," declares the LORD, the God of hosts; "and they shall oppress you from Lebo-hamath to the Brook of the Arabah."
zh: “看哪！以色列家， 我要興起一國攻擊你們， 這國要欺壓你們， 從哈馬關口直至亞拉巴河。” 這是萬軍耶和華 神的宣告。
